entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: A global research partnership of 15 diverse Centers dedicated to reducing poverty, enhancing food security, and improving natural resource management

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The goal of reducing the prevalence of poverty through agricultural innovation

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring all people have physical, social, and economic access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing land, water, soil, plants, and animals to ensure sustainable production

entities.name: FAIR PRINCIPLES
entities.description: Principles ensuring that research data is findable, accessible, interoperable, and reusable

entities.name: PUBLICATION AND DATA REPOSITORIES
entities.description: Systems used by CGIAR Centers to store and share research outputs and data

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRIAL DATA
entities.description: Data derived from agricultural field trials

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC DATA
entities.description: Data relating to the social and economic factors of agricultural adoption and impact

entities.name: ADOPTION DATA
entities.description: Data regarding the uptake of agricultural technologies by farmers

entities.name: CYBERINFRASTRUCTURE FOR AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A demand-driven technical infrastructure to index and interlink agricultural research data

entities.name: OPEN ACCESS
entities.description: The practice of providing unrestricted online access to research publications

entities.name: OPEN DATA
entities.description: The practice of making research data freely available to everyone to use and republish

entities.name: METADATA
entities.description: Structured information that describes, explains, locates, or otherwise makes it easier to retrieve and use an information resource

entities.name: INTEROPERABILITY STANDARDS
entities.description: Agreed-upon technical specifications that allow different systems to exchange and use information

entities.name: BILL AND MELINDA GATES FOUNDATION
entities.description: A philanthropic organization funding the Open Access and Open Data initiative at CGIAR

entities.name: BIG DATA AND ICT PLATFORM
entities.description: An ambitious technical platform developed by CGIAR for seamless discovery and analysis of research content

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The application of scientific research to improve agricultural productivity and livelihoods in developing regions

relationships.description: often used as a substitute for full data sets in repositories
